title: DEKTON DT80724 5piece Hook and loop palm sanding sheets, 107mmX175mm/ Course, 60 Grit
features: IDEAL FOR wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fibreglass, paint.
description: From the manufacturer DT80724 5PC 107MM X 175MM 60 GRIT HOOK AND LOOP PALM SANDING SHEETS Suitable for palm sanders. Multi-surface, ideal for use on wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fibreglass, paint. Pre-punched with holes for dust extraction. Aluminium oxide: Suitable for all grinding works from coarse cutting to precision grinding of wooden surfaces. Optimal cost-effectiveness Consistent sanding results due to an optimised spreading of grains Fast replacement of sanding sheets due to hook & loop velcro backing. Easy to use. ADVANCED FEATURES HOOK AND LOOP VELCRO DESIGN Sanding Pads are quick and easy to stick and change, convenient to use. The sanding sheets fits most palm sanders. Tip: Please clean the dust and replace the old hook and loop sanding sheet before use HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL AND DURABILITY Top layer: Durable calcined abrasive. Middle layer: Thick E paper backing (250g/m2). Bottom layer: Durable Velcro back. Sanding discs are made from aluminium oxide abrasive, durable and anti-static, increases its service life. PRE-PUNCHED HOLES Sander sheets pre-punched with holes, making them great for dust extraction. The back of the sanding sheets are designed with the hook and loop Velcro, which provides strong adhesion. Making them hard to fall off. The grit mark on the back helps you quickly identify and select the correct sanding disc. AVAILABLE IN VARIETY OF GRITS 5pc 40 grit DT80722. 5pc 60 grit DT80724. 5pc 80 grit DT80726. 5pc 120 grit DT80728. 12pc Mixed pack DT80730.
